author: David Meeker
notes: 2D FEM magnetostatic solver, triangular mesh, vector potential A formulation

author: Ghent University
notes: GPU-accelerated LLG solver, 16M cells, DMI, spin-transfer torques, GPLv3

title: OOMMF - Object Oriented Micromagnetic Framework
author: NIST Center for Nanoscale Materials
notes: NIST micromagnetic solver, finite-difference LLG, Tcl scripting, CPU-only

title: Elmer/FEM - Open-source multiphysics FEM
author: CSC Finland
notes: 3D electromagnetic solver, multiphysics coupling, MPI parallelization

title: Gmsh - Open-source 3D finite element mesh generator
author: Christophe Geuzaine
notes: 3D mesh generator with CAD engine, GetFEM++ integration for FEM

title: FEniCS/Dolfinx - Next-generation FEM platform
author: FEniCS Project
notes: PDE solving via FEM, variational forms, Nedelec elements for electromagnetics

title: magpylib - Open-source Python package for magnetic field computation
author: magpylib contributors
notes: Analytical magnetostatic field computation, vectorized, multiple magnet geometries

title: A $5M startup claims rare earth-free electric motor breakthrough
author: Electrek
notes: Vimag Labs VMSM, 5th Indian patent, virtual magnet synchronous motor, $5M Series A

title: New Electric Motor Tech Spins With No Magnets
author: Hackaday
notes: ZF SESM inductive coupling, 15% loss reduction, shaft-integrated transformer

title: VESC - Open-source electronic speed controller firmware

title: OpenMotors / OpenElectrical - Open-source electrical motor design

title: Reluctance motor without permanent magnets - SpinMag SpinRel
author: SpinMag
notes: SynRM IE4 efficiency, 39-92 Nm torque, 31 kW peak power, no magnets
